home.name: José Tebelán
home.title: Systems Engineer, Full Stack Developer and DevOps
home.description: Full Stack Developer with a focus on backend and software architecture, working as the sole developer alongside the CTO at a Guatemalan agro-tech startup. I have proposed and implemented deep architectural improvements: MongoDB schema migration, REST API refactoring, structural reorganization in AWS S3, and a cascade deletion system with database-level fallback. Additionally, I work on post-processing algorithms over image analysis and geospatial data pipelines. Main stack: Python, TypeScript, Next.js, MongoDB, and AWS.

techStack.title: Tech Stack
techStack.description: A set of technologies that I use in an integrated way to design, develop, and deploy modern web applications, prioritizing performance, maintainability, and scalability.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Throughout my career, I have had the opportunity to work on various projects that have allowed me to develop and refine my skills as a Full Stack and DevOps developer. My experience ranges from developing web applications to implementing cloud solutions, always with a focus on efficiency, scalability, and code quality.

items.title: Full Stack Developer
items.description:
Full Stack Developer at Ahau-x, a Guatemalan agro-tech startup specializing in computer vision applied to agriculture. Working directly alongside the CTO as the sole developer on the team, involved in the full development cycle: web applications (Next.js, TypeScript, React), desktop applications (Python, PySide), and post-processing algorithms over image analysis and geospatial data pipelines.

Since joining, I have proposed and implemented deep architectural improvements: MongoDB schema migration that reduced response times and improved horizontal scalability, complete REST API refactoring with JWT verification and strict typing, structural reorganization in AWS S3 with granular access policies, and a cascade deletion system with database-level trigger fallback. Additionally, I developed a super admin panel with role-based access control, an auto-update system for desktop applications, and HubSpot integration via webhooks.

items.title: Full Stack Developer
items.description: Development and maintenance of web and desktop applications focused on computer vision applied to agriculture. Implemented new features, fixed critical bugs, and optimized frontend and backend workflows through API integration, databases, and cloud services (AWS). Contributed to solutions combining data processing, results analysis, and visualization, maintaining scalability, stability, and production consistency.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Here are some of the projects I've worked on, showcasing my skills and experience in Full Stack development and DevOps. Each project highlights different technologies and solutions I've implemented to create impactful applications.

items.title: CookBook App
items.description: RecetarioWeb is a modern and robust full-stack web application designed to manage, share, and discover cooking recipes. The project combines a powerful backend developed with Django REST Framework and an interactive frontend built with Vue.js 3, offering a smooth and professional user experience.

items.title: Blog Spots
items.description: Flask-BlogPosts is a modern web application for creating and managing blogs. It allows users to register, create posts with a rich text editor, manage profiles with avatars stored in the cloud, and search content within the blog.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Do you have a project in mind? Let's talk.
contact.alsoFindMe: You can also find me on my social networks or send me a direct email.
